No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education, providing professional skills (digital literacy, communication) for employment, directly aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4.

Gender Equality.reason: The inference from 'global vision' to gender equality is too weak without more direct evidence in the course text.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for the journalism industry, fostering professional ethics and professionalism, which supports decent job creation and work environments (Targets 8.3, 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly cultivates 'innovation and entrepreneurship ability' and 'professional literacy in the digital age,' directly supporting innovation and technological upgrading (Targets 9.5, 9.b).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course fosters professional ethics in journalism, which is fundamental for ensuring public access to information (Target 16.10) and developing accountable, transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to global partnerships or cooperation.
